title: Pecan Pesto Bruschetta
description: In this pesto pecan nuts replace pine nuts. Toasted sourdough bread slices topped with this creamy pesto and air fried cherry tomatoes make a crunchy appetizer.
author: Sanjeev Kapoor

ingredients.raw: 1 cup fresh basil leaves + for garnish
ingredients.name: fresh basil leaves + for garnish

ingredients.raw: 30 grams parmesan cheese, cut into small cubes
ingredients.name: parmesan cheese, cut into small cubes

steps: Preheat the air fryer to 200⁰ C.
Line a baking tin with aluminium foil and transfer halved cherry tomatoes into it. Sprinkle salt and crushed black peppercorns and drizzle 1½ tablespoons olive oil and mix well.
Place the tin in the air fryer basket, fit it to the air fryer and air fry for 6-8 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a non-stick grill pan, place bread slices on it and grill on both sides till evenly golden brown or grill marks appear.
To make pesto, put pecan nuts in a grinder jar, add garlic and parmesan cheese and grind coarsely.
Add basil leaves, ¼ cup olive oil and salt and grind to a coarse pesto.
Place toasted bread slices on worktop and apply prepared pesto on them and transfer them on a serving platter.
Arrange cherry tomatoes on top. Break bocconcini cheese roundels roughly and arrange on top.
Garnish with basil leaves and rocket leaves, drizzle some pesto oil and serve.
